symptom_summary: ADR-036 chain treated UI as default formal layer despite skill/workflow scope
problem_description: In ADR-036 materialization, UI was implied as an independent SSOT layer even though the chain is a skill/workflow requirement. The run over-expanded by executing feat-to-ui as a default downstream leg, the release index retained UI artifact references that may mislead consumers, and IMPL documents inherited `UI missing_authority` status where `not_applicable` is the correct interpretation.
upstream_refs: ssot/epic/EPIC-IMPL-IMPLEMENTATION-READINESS__IMPL-实施前文档压力测试与-Implementation-Readiness-统一能力.md
